top.contains: A bright blue header containing the white 'prime' logo with its smile icon centered, positioned approximately in the middle third horizontally. Below the logo is a red label stating 'LOGO IS 50% OF DEPTH OF CONTAINER'.

bottom.contains: A blue border at the very bottom.

left.contains: A blue border with a vertical magenta text box that reads '5% OF WIDTH OF AD GIVES BORDER SIZE'.

right.contains: A blue border with a vertical yellow text box containing the text 'CONTANINER IS 25% OF HEIGHT OF AD'.

frameAnalysis.corners: The top-left and top-right contain vertical text boxes; a 'prime' logo and red instructional box are centered in the top header. There are no major design elements or logos in the bottom corners.
frameAnalysis.instructions: Ensure the primary subject or hero image is centered horizontally within the cutout space. Avoid placing any critical details or text in the top 15% of the frame to prevent them from being covered by the header elements. The bottom quarter of the image should remain relatively clear to prevent interference with the bottom border.

frameInstructions: Ensure the primary subject or hero image is centered horizontally within the cutout space.
